hero.title: Born from a love
hero.subtitle: Behind every Veency necklace are hours of dedication, carefully chosen materials, and the conviction that handmade craftsmanship holds a value no machine can replicate.

origin.title: A table, thread, beads
origin.p1: It all began in 2020, when Valentina — a designer at heart with hands always busy — decided to turn her passion for beads and threads into something more than a hobby. At her kitchen table, surrounded by seed beads, Shakiras, and colorful thread spools, the first necklace someone asked to buy was born.
origin.p2: That moment changed everything. What started as gifts for friends became orders, and orders became Veency: a brand built on the premise that every woman deserves to wear something unique, made especially for her.
origin.p3: Today, every piece still comes from the same hands that started in that kitchen, with the same care and the same excitement as day one.
origin.quote: Handmade things have a soul of their own

handmade.title: Handmade
handmade.desc: Every piece is unique, created with dedication and attention to detail. No two are alike — that is the magic of craftsmanship.

materials.title: Conscious Materials
materials.desc: We use natural, high-quality materials, with respect for their origin. Every bead, thread, and element is chosen mindfully.

design.title: Design with Soul
design.desc: Every necklace tells a story, reflecting personality and elegance. We design with the woman who will wear it in mind.

steps.title: Inspiration
steps.desc: We seek shapes, textures, and colors in nature. Each collection is born from an emotion, a landscape, a story we want to tell.

steps.title: Selection
steps.desc: We carefully choose every bead, thread, and material. We visit suppliers, touch each piece, and only keep what feels alive.

steps.title: Creation
steps.desc: Expert hands weave each piece with patience. There is no rush: craftsmanship deserves respect, and each necklace can take hours of meticulous work.

steps.title: Quality control
steps.desc: We review every detail before it reaches you. Thread tension, clasp closure, bead uniformity. Only if it moves us does it leave our hands.

cta.title: Every necklace has
cta.subtitle: Explore our collection and find the necklace that speaks to you. Handmade, crafted with love, designed to wear every day.
